creator: val@packett.cool
text:
Yeah, I always had the thing with the no borders/background on dropdowns/buttons/checkboxes/etc on GTK3. It's not a problem for me, I actually like the accidental flat design :D

But I wonder if there's something in LibreOffice that sets some GTK property and it's ifdef'd to Linux…

I started this whole patch specifically because I wanted GTK3 — because Wayland.

Sure, you can go ahead with GTK2 for now. Maybe gtk 2 and 3 flavors?
